summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of TEN MediaHQ completed successfully. All requested features are working correctly in demo mode.
passed_tests: Login page renders with Google and Demo Mode buttons
Demo Mode button works and navigates to dashboard
Demo mode persists in localStorage across page navigations
Dashboard shows KPI cards with demo data (12 members, 8 services, 18/25 equipment, 3 pending rotas)
Sidebar navigation shows all 10 modules and is not cramped
Demo Mode Active banner visible on all pages
Assign Rotas page: select service, select weekly lead, add team members, create rota
Rota creation shows success toast with '29 checklist items auto-populated' message
Checklists page: select service and view 29 checklist items
Checklist items can be toggled with progress bar updating
Equipment page: view equipment list with status badges (available, checked out, maintenance)
Equipment page: add new equipment (admin only) - modal form works correctly
Team Directory: shows team member cards with names, emails, roles, and skills
All pages have consistent dark slate theme
Logout clears demo mode from localStorage and redirects to login
test_credentials: Demo mode - no credentials required. Click 'Try Demo Mode' button on login page.
seed_data_creation: Demo mode uses mock data defined in React components
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features tested successfully in demo mode. Demo mode uses localStorage to persist state and mock data defined in React components. The app has 10 navigation modules: Dashboard, Team, Services, Assign Rotas, My Rotas, Equipment, Checklists, Reports, Training, Settings. All are accessible and functional in demo mode.
mocked_api_note: DEMO MODE uses MOCKED data - all API calls return demo data when demoMode is true in localStorage. This includes services, members, equipment, rotas, and checklists.

login_page.details: Google login button and Demo Mode button both visible and clickable

demo_mode.details: Demo mode enables correctly, persists in localStorage, and clears on logout

dashboard.details: KPI cards show: 12 Team Members, 8 Services, 18/25 Equipment, 3 Pending Rotas. Upcoming services and quick actions displayed.

sidebar_navigation.details: All 10 navigation items visible and not cramped: Dashboard, Team, Services, Assign Rotas, My Rotas, Equipment, Checklists, Reports, Training, Settings

assign_rotas.details: Service selection, weekly lead selection, team member assignment, and rota creation all working. Success toast shows '29 checklist items auto-populated'.

checklists.details: 29 checklist items displayed correctly. Items can be toggled with progress bar updating (0/29 to 2/29 tested).

equipment.details: Equipment list displayed with status badges. Add Equipment modal works for admin users.

team_directory.details: Team member cards displayed with names, emails, role badges (Admin, Team Lead, Member), and skills.

theme.details: Consistent dark slate theme across all pages
